auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Salesflare API key sent as a Bearer token. Create it in Salesflare under Settings > API keys.

owner.description: The ID of the user who owns the account.

address.description: The primary address of the account.

social_profiles.description: Social profiles associated with the account.

tags.description: Salesflare tag IDs or tag objects for the account.

custom.description: Salesflare custom field values keyed by API field name.

raw.description: Additional official Salesflare fields to merge into the request body.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Salesflare account.

owner.description: The ID of the user who owns the contact.

name.description: The full name of the contact.

account.description: The ID of the Salesflare account linked to the contact.

address.description: The primary address of the contact.

social_profiles.description: Social profiles associated with the contact.

tags.description: Salesflare tag IDs or tag objects for the contact.

custom.description: Salesflare custom field values keyed by API field name.

raw.description: Additional official Salesflare fields to merge into the request body.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Salesflare contact.

owner.description: The ID of the user who owns the opportunity.

account.description: The ID of the Salesflare account linked to the opportunity.

tags.description: Salesflare tag IDs or tag objects for the opportunity.

custom.description: Salesflare custom field values keyed by API field name.

raw.description: Additional official Salesflare fields to merge into the request body.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Salesflare opportunity.

account.description: The ID of the account linked to the task.

assignees.description: User IDs assigned to the task.

raw.description: Additional official Salesflare fields to merge into the request body.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Salesflare task.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve one Salesflare account by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Salesflare account.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve one Salesflare contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Salesflare contact.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the current Salesflare API user.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to retrieve the current Salesflare user.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Salesflare current user output.

actions.name: get_opportunity
actions.description: Retrieve one Salesflare opportunity by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Salesflare opportunity.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Salesflare accounts with optional search, pagination, and filters.

limit.description: The number of Salesflare records to return.

order_by.description: Salesflare sort instructions, such as name or creation_date desc.

details.description: Whether Salesflare should include detailed account data.

hotness.description: Salesflare hotness level: 1 room temp, 2 hot, or 3 on fire.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Salesflare accounts.

accounts.description: Salesflare accounts returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Salesflare account list output.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List Salesflare contacts with optional search, pagination, and filters.

limit.description: The number of Salesflare records to return.

order_by.description: Salesflare sort instructions, such as name or creation_date desc.

id.description: Filter contacts by Salesflare contact ID.

account.description: Filter contacts by Salesflare account ID.

includeArchived.description: Whether archived contacts should be included.

type.description: Filter contacts by Salesflare contact type.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Salesflare contacts.

contacts.description: Salesflare contacts returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Salesflare contact list output.

actions.name: list_opportunities
actions.description: List Salesflare opportunities with optional search, pagination, and filters.

limit.description: The number of Salesflare records to return.

order_by.description: Salesflare sort instructions, such as name or creation_date desc.

id.description: Filter opportunities by Salesflare opportunity ID.

stage.description: Filter opportunities by Salesflare stage ID.

owner.description: Filter opportunities by owner user ID.

hotness.description: Salesflare hotness level: 1 room temp, 2 hot, or 3 on fire.

details.description: Whether Salesflare should include detailed opportunity data.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Salesflare opportunities.

opportunities.description: Salesflare opportunities returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Salesflare opportunity list output.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: List Salesflare tasks with optional search, pagination, and filters.

limit.description: The number of Salesflare records to return.

order_by.description: Salesflare sort instructions, such as name or creation_date desc.

id.description: Filter tasks by Salesflare task ID.

assignees.description: User IDs assigned to the task.

type.description: Filter tasks by Salesflare task type.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Salesflare tasks.

tasks.description: Salesflare tasks returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Salesflare task list output.
